module_info.docstring: Tests for Evolver and EvolverStats classes.

functions.name: assert_evolver_stats
functions.docstring: Assert EvolverStats fields match expected values (only checks non-None fields).

functions.name: test_evolver_stats_initialization
functions.docstring: Test EvolverStats initialization with default values.

functions.name: test_evolver_stats_addition
functions.docstring: Test adding two EvolverStats objects.

functions.name: test_evolver_stats_in_place_addition
functions.docstring: Test += operator for EvolverStats.

functions.name: test_evolver_stats_effective_batch_size
functions.docstring: Test effective_batch_size computed field.

functions.name: test_evolver_stats_effective_batch_size_zero_calls
functions.docstring: Test effective_batch_size with zero mutate calls.

functions.name: test_evolver_stats_effective_batch_size_fractional
functions.docstring: Test effective_batch_size with fractional result.

functions.name: test_evolver_stats_average_learning_log_entries
functions.docstring: Test average_learning_log_entries_supplied computed field.

functions.name: test_evolver_stats_average_learning_log_entries_zero_calls
functions.docstring: Test average_learning_log_entries_supplied with zero mutate calls.

functions.name: test_evolver_initialization
functions.docstring: Test Evolver initialization with valid parameters.

functions.name: test_evolve_iteration_single_parent
functions.docstring: Test single iteration with one parent.

functions.name: test_evolve_iteration_multiple_parents
functions.docstring: Test iteration with multiple parents.

functions.name: test_evolve_iteration_multiple_mutators
functions.docstring: Test iteration with multiple mutators.

functions.name: test_evolve_iteration_with_verification
functions.docstring: Test mutation verification flow.

functions.name: test_evolve_iteration_verification_failures
functions.docstring: Test that failed verification prevents evaluation.

functions.name: test_evolve_iteration_without_verification
functions.docstring: Test that without verification, all mutations are evaluated.

functions.name: test_evolve_iteration_batch_mutation
functions.docstring: Test with batch-supporting mutator.

functions.name: test_evolve_iteration_non_batch_mutator_with_batch_size
functions.docstring: Test that non-batch mutators only receive 1 failure case regardless of batch_size.

functions.name: test_evolve_iteration_stats_tracking
functions.docstring: Test that stats are correctly accumulated across multiple operations.

functions.name: test_mutate_and_inject_attributes
functions.docstring: Test that organism attributes are correctly injected after mutation.

functions.name: test_mutate_and_inject_attributes_preserves_existing
functions.docstring: Test that attribute injection doesn't overwrite existing attributes.

functions.name: test_evolver_population_property
functions.docstring: Test the population property accessor.
